claim-unregistered-user: To claim an unregistered user, use the normal login system to initiate a claim.
claim-aredl-pemonlist: For AREDL and Pemonlist, this works assuming your account has been created with the same Discord account you're using to login.
claim-pointercrate: The Pointercrate Demonlist requires a different process, with a guide provided on our account linking guide.
claim-geometry-dash: As for Geometry Dash / Updated Leaderboard, it works if on the Updated Leaderboard, you are linked to said Geometry Dash account using the same Discord account.
claim-warning: If the claim didn't happen, contact a staff member on our Discord server.
